question: Is the image a realistic photography style depicting a morning garden scene with soft natural light?
Is there a round, light gray stone birdbath centered in the frame?
Are there water droplets on the birdbath rim and gentle ripples on the water surface?
Are there exactly 5 small birds perched on the birdbath edge?
Is the leftmost bird a brownish-gray sparrow with its head tilted down toward the water?
Is the bird to the immediate right of the leftmost sparrow a small sparrow with bright green feathers?
Is there a golden canary with fluffy feathers on the right side of the basin facing left?
Is there a bright blue small bird on the back edge of the birdbath with wings half-spread?
Is the rightmost bird grayish-white with tail feathers tilted upward?
Are there exactly 2 watering cans placed side by side on the sandy ground in front of the birdbath?
Is the left watering can red metal with a slender spout pointing to the right?
Is the right watering can matte purple metal with a spout pointing upper left?
Is there a green garden hose coiled in a circle to the right of the watering cans, with the end pointing lower left?
Are there two pairs of gloves stacked in the lower left corner: transparent PVC gloves on top of brown leather gloves?
Is there a shovel above the gloves with a black head pointing down and a wooden handle pointing upper right?
Is there a green, empty wheelbarrow in the center-left area with its wheel facing right?
Is there a white wooden fence with slightly peeling paint spanning the background behind the wheelbarrow?
Is there a dark wood-toned bench in the center-right area with dew visible on the seat?
Is there an orange and white cat lying down to the left of the bench, looking toward the birdbath?
Are there exactly 6 black garden lanterns arranged in two columns of 3 to the right of the bench?
Is there a sunflower in a terracotta pot in the right foreground, with the flower head facing upper left?
Is there a blue pot with pure white lavender spikes positioned behind the sunflower pot?
Are there exactly 2 orange and black butterflies hovering in the upper right with wings spread?
Are the animals (birds, cat, butterflies) free from severe physical distortions (e.g., extra limbs, malformed wings)?
